Game.Name: Jungle no Ouja Tar-chan - Sekaimanyuu Daikakutou no Maki (Japan)
Game.plot: Overview:Jungle no Ouja Tar-chan: Sekai Manyuu Dai Kakutou no Maki ("Jungle King Tar-chan: The Great World Tour Brawl") is a 1994 platformer based on the Jungle no Ouja Tar-chan manga and anime, featuring a comedic take on Edgar Rice Burroughs's Tarzan character. It was released in the middle of the manga's anime TV series adaptation.The player, as Tar-chan, must make their way through various platforming stages set in Tar-chan's savannah home and the nearby jungles and other African locales. There are multiple hostile soldiers with assault rifles, but because Tar-chan can only fight with his fists and feet, he must be careful when approaching them.Cheat: 23 ContinuesAt the title/mode select screen press in order the following buttons (with controller 2)
